title: Looot
description: Random item name generators and other loot table utilities
body:
Looot library mod for minecraft forge that adds additional utilities for loot tables for use by other mods and datapacks.

This mod does not directly add any content to the game!

Among other things, it adds a loot table function to randomly generate names for enchanted items. See the wiki link for technical details.

![]( https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jv34cmK0/images/de9fc918d1c5c2c4f2a0f709376db30835d7b51b.png)
